ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulation_data" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation run */,
  "timer" REAL /* Timestamp of the simulation data */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle model */,
  "pos_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the vehicle's position */,
  "pos_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the vehicle's position */,
  "pos_z" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the vehicle's position */,
  "dir_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the vehicle's direction */,
  "dir_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the vehicle's direction */,
  "dir_z" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the vehicle's direction */,
  "vel_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the vehicle's velocity */,
  "vel_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the vehicle's velocity */,
  "vel_z" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the vehicle's velocity */,
  "steering" REAL /* Current steering angle of the vehicle */,
  "steering_input" TEXT /* Steering input to the vehicle */,
  "brake" REAL /* Current brake pressure */,
  "brake_input" TEXT /* Brake input to the vehicle */,
  "throttle" REAL /* Current throttle position */,
  "throttle_input" TEXT /* Throttle input to the vehicle */,
  "wheelspeed" REAL /* Speed of the vehicle's wheels */,
  "vel_kmh" REAL /* Vehicle velocity in km/h */,
  "is_oob" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the vehicle is out of bounds */,
  "oob_counter" INTEGER /* Counter for the number of times the vehicle is out of bounds */,
  "max_oob_percentage" REAL /* Maximum percentage of the vehicle's trajectory that is out of bounds */,
  "oob_distance" REAL /* Distance of the vehicle's trajectory that is out of bounds */,
  "oob_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the vehicle's trajectory that is out of bounds */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Weather condition during the simulation */,
  "road_surface" TEXT /* Road surface during the simulation */,
  "traffic_pattern" TEXT /* Traffic pattern during the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id", "timer"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_data_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES vehicle_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_state" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation run */,
  "timer" REAL /* Timestamp of the vehicle state */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle model */,
  "is_oob" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the vehicle is out of bounds */,
  "oob_counter" INTEGER /* Counter for the number of times the vehicle is out of bounds */,
  "max_oob_percentage" REAL /* Maximum percentage of the vehicle's trajectory that is out of bounds */,
  "oob_distance" REAL /* Distance of the vehicle's trajectory that is out of bounds */,
  "oob_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the vehicle's trajectory that is out of bounds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id", "timer"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_state_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES vehicle_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_controls" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation run */,
  "timer" REAL /* Timestamp of the control inputs */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle model */,
  "steering_input" TEXT /* Steering input to the vehicle */,
  "brake_input" TEXT /* Brake input to the vehicle */,
  "throttle_input" TEXT /* Throttle input to the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id", "timer"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_controls_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES vehicle_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_dynamics" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation run */,
  "timer" REAL /* Timestamp of the vehicle dynamics */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle model */,
  "pos_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the vehicle's position */,
  "pos_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the vehicle's position */,
  "pos_z" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the vehicle's position */,
  "dir_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the vehicle's direction */,
  "dir_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the vehicle's direction */,
  "dir_z" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the vehicle's direction */,
  "vel_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the vehicle's velocity */,
  "vel_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the vehicle's velocity */,
  "vel_z" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the vehicle's velocity */,
  "wheelspeed" REAL /* Speed of the vehicle's wheels */,
  "vel_kmh" REAL /* Vehicle velocity in km/h */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id", "timer"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_dynamics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES vehicle_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_scenarios" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation scenario */,
  "scenario_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation scenario */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation scenario */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Weather condition for the scenario */,
  "road_surface" TEXT /* Road surface for the scenario */,
  "traffic_pattern" TEXT /* Traffic pattern for the scenario */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation run */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation scenario */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle model */,
  "start_time" REAL /* Start time of the simulation run */,
  "end_time" REAL /* End time of the simulation run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation run */,
  "scenario_name" TEXT /* Name of the scenario used in the simulation run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_runs_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES simulation_scenarios ("scenario_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user access event */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation run */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the simulation run */,
  "access_time" REAL /* Time when the user accessed the simulation run */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "simulation_run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES simulation_runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle model */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle model */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor data entry */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation run */,
  "timer" REAL /* Timestamp of the sensor data */,
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor type */,
  "data" TEXT /* Raw data from the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES simulation_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation result */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation run */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Metric evaluated in the simulation */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., distance, speed, acceleration) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES simulation_runs ("run_id")
)
